description_long: This is a modern luxury yacht with a sleek, elongated hull and a streamlined superstructure. The hull is predominantly white with brown accents along the sides and deck, giving it a sophisticated appearance. The deck features multiple levels, including an open aft area and a partially enclosed cabin with large windows for panoramic views. The yacht has a pointed bow and a wide stern, with visible steps leading up to the main cabin area. The superstructure includes a raised bridge or flybridge, supported by angular struts, and the overall design emphasizes both comfort and style. The yacht's exterior is finished with smooth, hard surfaces, and the windows are dark-tinted for privacy.
description: A sleek, modern luxury yacht with a white and brown color scheme, featuring a multi-level deck, large windows, and a streamlined hull.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the elongated hull, brown accent stripe, and the full length of the superstructure with visible windows and flybridge.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wide stern, open aft deck, and steps leading up to the main cabin area.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the hull's shape, superstructure, and deck layout.
description_view_3: Front view showing the pointed bow, angular lines of the hull, and the forward-facing windows of the cabin.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a deep-V profile, pointed bow, and wide stern. The hull is white with a prominent brown accent stripe along the side, and features angular lines and a stepped aft section.
attribute_deck_layout: Multi-level deck with an open aft area, steps leading up to the main cabin, and a raised flybridge supported by angular struts. The deck includes walkways along the sides and a partially enclosed main cabin with large windows.
attribute_cabin_structure: Single main cabin structure located amidships, with a rectangular shape, large dark-tinted windows on both sides, and a flat roof. The cabin is integrated with the flybridge above and has visible entry points at the rear.
